rationale: The citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending online word-of-mouth research and tests mechanisms involving customer-initiated social interactions versus firm-initiated communication, which makes a WOM-drivers paper plausibly theory/mechanism-relevant rather than incidental. The cited paper is a core study on immediate vs. ongoing WOM drivers, and with only a DOI-level match (no in-text context), there is insufficient evidence to safely treat this as obvious mention-only.
